textByHash.0f1175757daddcc551f5729f8bc6e0e30c7483c8: Apparently he has men there as well, who have also been threatening people.
textByHash.5ce84459003dd0d9f8d67e0847f18e74deba8cac: And it's said that they even intend to steal from the ruler of Al Kharid himself!
textByHash.673ab2d10c7cca1457e082cf8dac4bc78533a35e: I don't like him. He makes all these claims about being the best salesman in Gielinor, and he even has some thugs that he's hired to threaten us.
textByHash.98abfb2971f71e1cb3ff57788c720338c772f7e1: One of them came round here and threatened to cut my head off if I didn't cooperate with them!
textByHash.a05324d2d33012d6448397c896e70f2eba9c97ee: That's what I've heard. Anyway, are you sure you wouldn't like a kebab?
textByHash.a18d86bcd2efd33ddf918d7b997acc036f34d708: No that's not right, think again.
textByHash.a45577b5dd1a56caaac4ef7e067ee5e0cab4d230: Please enter the answer to the riddle.
textByHash.b8f3dd0ede16d8a8e7f211f998a8a83aaa2b62e2: I've got a little problem for you to solve.
textByHash.d5f87462279168f0a5506600e83d87a16ec96408: Can't say as I've seen him... I'm sure if he's been to Al Kharid recently someone around here will have though.
textByHash.e50e753f8593fe1666aa4704ce3aceb558334c76: Come back when you have some.
textByHash.e597b3e5dd0064b5fa9195fc9a5b363f7802fe9a: Would you like to buy a nice kebab? Only one gold.
textByHash.fd511281089190e54ba2bc39bfb115cffbc26016: I've also heard some rumours about them from my friend Ali in Pollnivneach...
